description: FamilySearch record search returning ZERO results when the skill searches for 'Mary Jackson' in the 1890 collection. Models the real-world case Clorinda raised: in the 1890 enumeration of this household, the informant was a neighbor (not the head of household) who knew Mary only by her community nickname 'Bitsie'. The record is indexed under 'Bitsie Jackson' — the formal-name search under-matches. Fixture predicate is substring-match on givenName='~Mary' AND collection='~1890', so it fires whenever the skill searches the 1890 collection by the formal name. The skill should treat this empty result as a signal to retry using the documented Nickname from tree person I1.
